claim_error_rules.message: Claim has non-related op with main op code
claim_error_rules.meaning: One or more labor operation lines do not properly relate to the selected main operation code.
validation_checks: Confirm the main OP code is correct for the repair
Confirm each added labor line is allowed with the main OP code
Confirm the causal part supports the selected repair logic
Review whether one or more labor lines should be removed or replaced
recommended_fix_steps: Review the main OP code first
Review all related OP code lines for logical relation to the main repair
Remove non-related OP lines if they are not allowed
Correct the labor structure and resubmit

claim_error_rules.message: *TT opcode not allowed as main OP
claim_error_rules.meaning: A TT operation code cannot be used as the primary operation code on the claim.
validation_checks: Identify the correct primary OP code for the actual repair
Check whether the TT code is only valid as a supporting or related line
Confirm the labor operation structure matches Hyundai claim logic
recommended_fix_steps: Replace the TT code as the main OP with the correct primary OP code
Move the TT code to a supporting position only if allowed
Recalculate labor if needed
Resubmit after correction

claim_error_rules.message: Op Code not applicable to Causal Part
claim_error_rules.meaning: The selected labor operation does not align with the causal part entered on the claim.
validation_checks: Confirm the causal part number is correct
Confirm the selected OP code is valid for that part
Check labor applicability by repair type and part usage
recommended_fix_steps: Correct the causal part if it is wrong
Correct the OP code if it is wrong
Review whether the part or repair line was entered incorrectly
Resubmit after alignment

claim_error_rules.meaning: The entered OP code is not valid in the current claim context.
validation_checks: Check for typing or formatting errors
Confirm the code is valid for the selected claim type
Confirm the code is valid for the vehicle, campaign, or repair
recommended_fix_steps: Correct the OP code entry
Replace with the valid Hyundai labor operation
Resubmit after confirming applicability

claim_error_rules.meaning: The claim was not accepted as submitted and must be corrected before resubmission.
validation_checks: Read the return code and message carefully
Review whether a dealer reply is required
Review any remark history
Inspect the section connected to the error code
recommended_fix_steps: Open the returned claim
Review the exact return reason
Correct the field, OP line, part line, or attachment issue
Add dealer reply when required
Resubmit only after validation

claim_error_rules.meaning: The submitted claim cannot be matched to the required corresponding repair claim.
validation_checks: Confirm the repair claim exists
Confirm RO number and claim information match exactly
Confirm causal part information is valid
Confirm the linked repair claim has already been accepted or is present
recommended_fix_steps: Correct the RO number or claim reference
Correct the linked repair-claim data
If needed, contact WCC through the Warranty Support Portal
Resubmit after claim linkage is valid

claim_error_rules.message: Claim in hold status pending corresponding repair claim match
claim_error_rules.meaning: The claim entered hold status because the system could not validate the corresponding repair claim information.
validation_checks: Check whether the RO number is correct
Check whether the causal part is correct
Check whether the corresponding repair claim has been submitted and accepted
Check whether the claim type was entered correctly
recommended_fix_steps: Monitor the claim during the hold period
Correct invalid RO or causal part data if found
If no corresponding claim exists, contact WCC for immediate processing where appropriate
Resolve before the 7-day hold window ends

claim_error_rules.meaning: One or more required claim attachments are missing, incomplete, uncategorized, or not compliant.
validation_checks: Confirm required attachments are present
Confirm each file has the correct category selected
Confirm file size is within allowed limit
Confirm images or videos are clear and usable
recommended_fix_steps: Upload the missing attachment
Assign the correct attachment category
Replace invalid or unreadable files
Resubmit after attachment requirements are satisfied

claim_error_rules.meaning: A powertrain-related claim requires Original Owner Verification before it can be accepted.
validation_checks: Confirm the claim falls under 10 year / 100,000 mile powertrain logic
Confirm Original Owner Verification record exists
Confirm supporting owner-validation documents are attached if required
recommended_fix_steps: Complete the Original Owner Verification workflow
Attach required owner-validation support
Submit the powertrain claim only after owner verification is on file

claim_error_rules.message: PDI performed after Retail Delivery Date or Demo date
claim_error_rules.meaning: PDI claims are not accepted when the PDI was performed after Retail Delivery Date or Demo date.
validation_checks: Confirm PDI completion date
Confirm RDR date
Confirm demo date if applicable
recommended_fix_steps: Verify date entry accuracy
Correct the date if data entry caused the issue
Do not resubmit if the PDI timing truly falls outside Hyundai acceptance rules
